message.content:
@startuml

class Metric {
  resultCompare()
  sendNotification()
}

class DataSet {
  value
  date
  dataSetType
  --
  getValue()
  getDate()
  getDataSetType()
  ..return..
  return date to compare
  and info about metric type
}

class ResultCompare {
  currentValue
  previousValue
  dataSetType
  --
  CmpMethods()
  ..return..
  (-1;0;1)
}

class Notification {
  sendTo
  message
  --
  sendMethod()
  ..return..
  send message
}

class SendMethod {
  sendMethod()
  ..return..
  send method
}

class CmpMethods {
  cmpMethod()
  ..return..
  select method
}

Metric ..> ResultCompare
Metric ..> Notification
ResultCompare ..> CmpMethods
ResultCompare ..> DataSet
Notification ..> SendMethod

@enduml
